text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond runs in the Satsuki Sho.
However, another Umamusume's stumble leaves
her finishing in third place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Satono family jinx of never winning G1 races
still hangs over her, but instead of feeling sorry
for herself, Satono Diamond feels invigorated
and swears to win the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Kitasan Black and Satono Diamond run in
different races, they continue to encourage each
other on their parallel paths.
